item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggers the brake, explicitly rejects making another entrance verifier a standing role, recognizes the repeated pattern of manual checks masking system/rule gaps, and moves upstream to rule/data/process fixes such as automatic numbering, format validation, duplicate checks, and pre-submit prompts. It allows only a bounded one-day emergency check with automatic removal, so it does not fall into the fail signal of simply adding another permanent manual gate."}
